My Projects

8 real-world projects solving real business problems — click a tool below to filter by category.

Excel
01
ExcelPivot TablesPower QueryDashboard
Executive Sales Dashboard
⚡ Problem: No clear visibility of sales trends, product performance & regional results

Built a fully dynamic Excel executive dashboard analyzing $1.6M in sales across stores, regions, products and salespersons — with KPI cards, bubble charts, sparklines and interactive slicers.

Total revenue of $1.6M — up 29% vs prior year
Tablets led product revenue at $289.9K (17.89% of total)
Ryan was the top regional manager with $368.5K in sales
North region outperformed all others at $368.5K revenue
Excel · Sales Analysis View Project →
Excel
02
ExcelPivot TablesSurvey AnalysisDashboard
Women Involvement & Peacebuilding — Plateau State, Nigeria
⚡ Problem: Understanding women's role and barriers in peacebuilding across local governments

Analyzed survey responses from 400 respondents across 6 LGAs in Plateau State, Nigeria. Used Excel Pivot Tables and dashboard design to uncover key insights on gender, participation and challenges in peacebuilding.

282 out of 400 respondents were female (70.5%)
184 respondents confirmed women play an active role in peacebuilding
Lack of resources & funding was the #1 challenge cited (160 responses)
Legal reforms to protect women was the top recommended strategy (140)
Excel · Survey & Social Analysis View Project →
Power BI
03
Power BIDAXSentiment AnalysisDashboard
Customer Feedback Analysis
⚡ Problem: No structured way to monitor customer sentiment across products and time

Built an interactive Power BI dashboard to analyze 40,000 customer feedback entries across 10 products and 100 customers. Tracked sentiment, feedback types and monthly trends with dynamic slicers.

60.12% of all feedback was positive across all products
Product G & Product A led with 4.1K feedback entries each
May had the highest monthly feedback volume at 3,533 entries
Suggestions, Complaints and Praise were nearly evenly distributed
Power BI · Customer Analytics View Project →
Power BI
04
Power BIDAXHealthcare Analytics3-Page Report
Healthcare Analysis Dashboard & Insights
⚡ Problem: No unified view of patient data, billing trends and medical conditions across hospitals

Developed a comprehensive 3-page Power BI report covering 55,500 patients across 40K hospitals. Covers patient demographics, medical conditions by gender, billing by insurance provider, admission type and yearly trends.

Total billing reached $1.42bn across 55,500 patients
Middle-aged adults are the largest patient group at 20.5K
Germany showed significantly higher churn vs Spain and France
Urgent admissions had the highest billing at $479.49M
2021 was the peak billing year at $286.55M
Power BI · Healthcare Analytics View Project →
Excel
05
ExcelDashboardFinancial AnalysisCalculations
Personal Finance Tracker
⚡ Problem: No clear view of personal income sources, expenses and monthly financial trends

Built a dynamic personal finance tracker in Excel showing available balance, income sources, expense categories and both monthly and weekly spending trends — all in one clean dashboard view.

Available balance of $35,249 from total income of $65,440
Data with Decisions is the top income source at $50,000 (76%)
Housing is the biggest expense at $9,000 per month
Monday recorded the highest weekly spending activity
Excel · Personal Finance View Project →
Excel
06
ExcelMap VisualizationMarket AnalysisDashboard
Nigeria Car Market Dashboard
⚡ Problem: No structured analysis of pricing, performance and preferences in the Nigerian car market

Analyzed the Nigerian car market using data sourced from Car45.com. Built an Excel dashboard with map visualization covering average pricing, mileage, horsepower, engine size, top car models and buyer preferences across Nigeria.

Average car price in Nigeria is ₦5.0M with 28.4K km mileage
Toyota leads the Nigerian car market by a significant margin
94% of Nigerian drivers prefer Automatic over Manual cars
Lagos and Abuja remain the primary hotspots for car sales
Excel · Nigerian Market Analysis View Project →
Excel
07
ExcelDashboardKPI AnalysisMap Visualization
Business Performance & Customer Insights
⚡ Problem: No unified dashboard to track sales, profitability and customer satisfaction across regions

Built a professional Excel dashboard tracking business KPIs including sales vs target, profit completion rates, monthly customer growth trends, regional distribution and customer experience ratings — with a geographical map.

Sales of $157,361 achieved at 86% completion rate vs $166,999 target
East region leads regional sales distribution at 32%
Speed rated highest in customer experience at 96 points
Availability is the biggest gap area with only 41 points
Excel · Business Performance View Project →
Excel
08
ExcelChurn AnalysisDemographicsStatistical Analysis
Bank Customer Churn Analysis Dashboard
⚡ Problem: Bank losing customers with no data-driven understanding of who churns and why

Built a multi-page Excel dashboard analyzing churn patterns across 10,000 bank customers. Includes scatter plots, correlation analysis, map visualization and a full written insights panel across Dashboard, Demographics and Analysis sheets.

2,038 customers churned (20.38%) out of 10,000 total
Germany had the highest churn rate at 32.44% across all locations
Old age group churns the most at 49.76% — age is a key churn driver
Female churn rate (25.07%) significantly higher than male (16.47%)
Churned customers had higher avg bank balance ($91,109 vs $72,743)
Excel · Banking & Churn Analytics View Project →

About Me

// Who I Am

Turning Data Into
Decisions That Matter

I'm Kolawole Emmanuel Oluwaseyi, a passionate Data Analyst with hands-on experience in Excel, Power BI, and SQL. I've built 8 real-world projects spanning healthcare, banking, finance, market analysis and social research.

My approach goes beyond crunching numbers — I focus on understanding the business question first, then crafting the right analysis to answer it clearly, visually, and in a way that anyone can understand.

Whether it's a dynamic Excel dashboard, an interactive Power BI report, or a deep SQL analysis, I build solutions that people actually use and trust.
